description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat, modern roof and a minimalist rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by sections of natural wood paneling, especially on the interior and rear walls. Large windows and glass doors are present on one side, allowing ample natural light into the open-plan living space, which includes visible furnishings such as a sofa, table, and indoor plants. The structure sits on a green base, simulating a lawn or garden area, and the interior is partially visible due to the open wall design. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on open space and modern materials.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with white walls, wood accents, large windows, and a flat roof, set on a green lawn base. The open-plan interior is visible, featuring contemporary furnishings and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the bungalow with large windows and glass doors, revealing the open-plan living area and indoor plants.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the wood-paneled wall, a central window, and minimal exterior openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_2: This side view displays a mix of white and wood surfaces, a side door, and a clear view into the living space with furniture.
description_view_3: The front view features the main entrance area, large glass panels, and a partial view of the interior layout and furnishings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side windows and glass doors
